en_title: Marvel Cinematic Universe Is 'Back to Phase Zero' With Avengers: Doomsday, Director Says
cn_title: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》导演称MCU重回“零阶段”
subtitle: 一切从零开始
opus_summary: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》联合导演乔·罗素在SXSW上表示，MCU将借该片“重回零阶段”，彻底重启而非依赖过去。小罗伯特·唐尼饰演反派毁灭博士。该片计划今年12月上映，可能标志着MCU阶段划分的终结，为全新开端铺路。

paragraphs.en: The Marvel Cinematic Universe is “back to phase zero” with the release of Avengers: Doomsday, co-director Joe Russo has said.
paragraphs.cn: 《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》联合导演乔·罗素表示，随着该片上映，漫威电影宇宙将「重回零阶段」。

paragraphs.en: Speaking at SXSW, attended by The Hollywood Reporter , Russo told fans to expect “some shifting and changing” with Doomsday, starring former Iron Man actor Robert Downey Jr. playing antagonist Dr. Doom.
paragraphs.cn: 据《好莱坞报道者》报道，罗素在SXSW上对粉丝表示，《毁灭之日》将带来「一些转变和变化」，该片由前钢铁侠演员小罗伯特·唐尼饰演反派毁灭博士。

paragraphs.en: “So, get ready for it. Look, we were with Rob [Downey Jr.] earlier today. We were both talking about this concept that we are back to phase zero. This is starting over from scratch. We want to make sure everybody feels like this isn’t leaning on anything from the past.”
paragraphs.cn: 「所以，做好准备吧。我们今天早些时候和罗伯（小唐尼）在一起。我们都在讨论这个概念——我们回到了零阶段。这是从零开始。我们想确保每个人都觉得这不是在依赖过去。」

paragraphs.en: The MCU is divided up into six phases: the first three made up The Infinity Saga, and the second three are dubbed The Multiverse Saga. It’s a categorization that began in 2008 and is planned out up to 2027. Phase Six began with the release of The Fantastic Four: First Steps last year. It was thought that this December’s Avengers: Doomsday and next year’s Avengers: Secret Wars, as well as this summer’s Spider-Man: Brand New Day, would be included in Phase Six. But Russo’s comment suggests the end of phases altogether for something of a reboot with Doomsday.
paragraphs.cn: MCU分为六个阶段：前三阶段构成无限传奇，后三阶段被称为多元宇宙传奇。这一分类始于2008年，计划持续到2027年。第六阶段始于去年上映的《神奇四侠：第一步》。原本认为今年12月的《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》、明年的《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》以及今年夏天的《蜘蛛侠：崭新的一天》都将属于第六阶段。但罗素的评论暗示，阶段划分将彻底终结，取而代之的是《毁灭之日》带来的重启。

paragraphs.en: And while Russo insists Doomsday “isn’t leaning on anything from the past,” it features a number of fan favorite characters and actors from the original Avengers team, including Chris Evans as Steve Rogers and Chris Hemsworth as Thor. The question is, what will this Phase Zero mean for the ongoing MCU?
paragraphs.cn: 尽管罗素坚称《毁灭之日》「不依赖过去」，但片中仍出现了多位原复仇者联盟的粉丝喜爱角色和演员，包括克里斯·埃文斯饰演的史蒂夫·罗杰斯和克里斯·海姆斯沃斯饰演的雷神。问题是，这个「零阶段」对正在进行的MCU意味着什么？

paragraphs.en: Perhaps we'll need to brace ourselves for a bunch of new young actors playing The Avengers and other Marvel heroes, as the MCU ditches the old in favor of the new. Last year, Marvel Studios chief Kevin Feige said the studio planned to recast the X-Men characters when the superhero team gets its own MCU movie , pointing to the Secret Wars comics from 2015 as the studio’s inspiration for a “reset” of the MCU.
paragraphs.cn: 也许我们需要做好准备，迎接一批新的年轻演员饰演复仇者联盟和其他漫威英雄，因为MCU正在弃旧迎新。去年，漫威影业总裁凯文·费奇表示，当X战警拥有自己的MCU电影时，工作室计划重新选角，并指出2015年的《秘密战争》漫画是MCU「重置」的灵感来源。

paragraphs.en: “We’re utilizing that [story] not just to round out the stories we’ve been telling post-Endgame, just as importantly — and you can look at the Secret Wars comics for where that takes you — it very, very much sets us up for the future,” Feige said.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们利用那个（故事）不仅是为了完善我们在《终局之战》后讲述的故事，同样重要的是——你可以看看《秘密战争》漫画会带你走向何方——它非常非常地为我们的未来奠定了基础，」费奇说道。

paragraphs.en: “Endgame, literally, was about endings. Secret Wars is about is about beginnings.”
paragraphs.cn: 「《终局之战》字面意义上讲的是结局。《秘密战争》讲的是开端。」

paragraphs.en: And Marvel is reportedly focusing on making an X-Men movie with a younger cast "to keep the cost down," as well as Black Panther 3, while it's apparently in no rush to get Blade or Deadpool 4 out the door.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，漫威正专注于制作一部由年轻演员阵容出演的X战警电影以「降低成本」，同时也在筹备《黑豹3》，但显然并不急于推出《刀锋战士》或《死侍4》。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
